# Joshua Humphreys Web Design & IT Services

> Joshua Humphreys is a freelance web designer and IT specialist based in Fernandina Beach, FL, serving clients locally across Northeast Florida (Amelia Island, Yulee, Jacksonville, Nassau County) and remotely anywhere in the United States.

## Services and Pricing

- Starter Website Package: $500 one-time. 1 to 3 custom pages, mobile responsive, basic SEO, contact form, Google Business Profile setup.
- Professional Website Package: $1,200 one-time. 4 to 8 pages, advanced SEO with schema markup, image gallery, social media integration, analytics, AI-optimized content.
- E-Commerce Website Package: $2,500 one-time. Full online store with product listings, shopping cart, payment processing, inventory management.
- AI-Ready Website Package: From $2,000. Website built with Generative Engine Optimization (GEO) for visibility in ChatGPT, Perplexity, Google AI, and Claude.
- Full Website Redesign: From $1,500. Complete overhaul of existing website with modern design, SEO fixes, and faster load times.
- Monthly Maintenance: $75/month. Content updates, backups, and tech support.
- Google Business Profile Setup: Included with website packages or available standalone.
- IT Support: CompTIA A+ certified. Computer repairs, network setup, software troubleshooting. Available in person locally or remotely.

## Key Facts

- Location: Fernandina Beach, FL
- Remote: Available anywhere in the United States
- Phone: (904) 310-4371
- Email: 2002magpie@gmail.com
- Website: https://joshuahumphreys.net
- Pricing: Flat-rate, no hourly billing, no contracts
- Turnaround: Most websites completed in 1 to 2 weeks
- Certification: CompTIA A+
